p.strong: Zero-copy layout with direct element indexing
p.em: Intel® 64 and IA-32 Architectures Optimization Reference Manual Style

div.p: asm ; Calculate EA for Element[i] ; Base Pointer in RAX ; Index in RCX ; Element Size (S) as immediate
MOV EBX, [RAX] ; Fetch element_count (Offset 0) ADD RAX, 4 ; Skip header to reach Element[0] IMUL RCX, S ; Scale index by sizeof(T) LEA RDI, [RAX + RCX] ; Final Effective Address
